title: HIVE Digital Technologies Crosses 16 EH/s, Marching Toward 25 EH/s as Expansion in Paraguay Powers Forward
text: HIVE Digital Technologies announced it has surpassed 16 exahash per second of global Bitcoin mining hashrate. The company's daily Bitcoin output has exceeded 8 BTC, representing a doubling of production since May 2025. The company's Paraguay expansion is progressing rapidly, with over 5 EH/s of next-generation Bitmain S21+ Hydro miners already operational in Phase 2 at Yguazú. According to COO Luke Rossy, With over 5 EH/s of next-generation Bitmain S21+ Hydro miners already energized in Phase 2 at Yguazú, and new machines arriving weekly, the team continues accelerated deployment. Phase 3 deployment at the Valenzuela site is expected to begin in September. Once complete, HIVE projects 12 BTC daily production with global fleet efficiency around 17.5 joules per terahash. CEO Aydin Kilic emphasized the company's strategy: After scaling from 6 EH/s to 16 EH/s so far this year, we expect to complete Phase 2 at Yguazu on schedule, and reach 18 EH/s in the coming weeks.
